across.clue: When something is minimal, it is very small.
if a bird or animal migrates it travels to another part of the world for warmer weather at a particular time of the year.
An auction is a public sale where things are sold to the highest bidder.
Paralysis is the loss of the ability to move all or part of your body.
Housekeeping is the maintenance of a house or an establishment like a hotel.
Disgrace is a state of shame and loss of respect.
To flatter people means to praise them in an effort to please them.
Acceptance is when people agree that an idea, statement, explanation, etc., is right or true.
the type of place that an animal normally lives in or a plant normally grows in.
Moisture is small drops of water in the air or on a surface.

down.clue: A patent is a right to be the only person allowed to make or sell a new product.
Harmony is a feeling that everything is peaceful, balanced, and in agreement.
A literary person or thing is involved with literature in some way.
A blossom is a flower or a mass of flowers on a tree or bush.
To facilitate something is to make it easier.
End something | Bring sth to a ___
To penetrate something means to enter into it.
To damage something is to cause its destruction.
Ethics are moral beliefs or rules about right or wrong.
To make less progress or be less successful than other people who are doing a similar job or activity. | fall ___
